description: A daytime photograph of the facade of the Frances Perkins Department of Labor Building in Washington, D.C., shot from a low angle against a blue sky with white clouds. On the left a large vertical American flag is draped down the building. On the right hangs a tall maroon and sepia-toned portrait banner of former President Theodore Roosevelt bearing a small 'AMERICA 250' mark and large white serif text reading 'AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST.' A flag on a pole and a cluster of white globe streetlamps are also visible, with small figures on the rooftop.
notable_text: AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST. AMERICA 250. (Theodore Roosevelt banner.)
